name: recast
description: Take a story and replace the characters with new ones in a different setting

original.name: Get Original
original.prompt:
Write a very short story (2 paragraphs) based on: $1

Include named characters and a clear setting.

analyze.name: Analyze
analyze.prompt:
Analyze this story and identify:
1. The main characters and their traits
2. The key plot points
3. The emotional arc

Story:
{{original_story}}

Be concise — one line per item.

recast.name: Recast

default.system_prompt: You are a creative fiction writer. Output only the story text.

analyst.system_prompt: You are a literary analyst. Be precise and concise.
